title: Air pollution and health effects: A study of medical visits among children in Santiago, Chile.
ehr_evidence: Data on morbidity due to respiratory diseases among children under 15 year of age have been collected from a group of public primary health clinics... record-keeping staff at each clinic... total number of child medical visits and respiratory morbidity diagnoses was collected every day.
summary: A time-series analysis examining the association between air pollution (PM10 and ozone) and medical visits for respiratory symptoms among children in Santiago, Chile.
key_findings: Significant association between PM10 and medical visits for lower respiratory symptoms in children ages 3-15 and children under age 2.
PM10 associated with upper respiratory symptoms in the older cohort.
Ozone associated with both lower and upper respiratory symptoms in the older cohort.
population: children under 2 and children 3-15 years of age in Santiago, Chile
limitations: missing values or insufficient information in some clinics
